## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`

## Risk Notes

- [ ] Changes storage, route ownership, destructive actions, or quota behavior.
- [ ] Changes user-facing UI flows.
- [ ] Changes public docs or contributor workflow.
